Joint Statement on Sudan Detention Practices

July 15, 2026 12:00PM EDT | Statement

Joint Statement by Human Rights Organizations

Share this via Facebook

We, the undersigned human rights organizations, are gravely concerned about ongoing arbitrary detention practices in Sudan and neighboring Chad.

Authorities in Sudan and Chad should immediately release all individuals held without charge.

Region / Country
  • Africa
  • Sudan
  • Chad
Topic
  • Detention
